results.title: Ronaldo leads emotional tribute to late teammate as Portugese icon responds to bombshell report
results.description: Cristiano Ronaldo addressed reports of his impending retirement from international football as Portugal's players celebrated a dramatic 2-1 victory against Croatia in their World Cup Round of 32 clash in Toronto.

results.title: Mariners' Rodriguez removed after being hit in helmet by thrown ball
results.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Seattle center fielder Julio Rodriguez was removed from the Mariners' game against Los Angeles Angels on Thursday night after being hit in the back of the helmet by a thrown ball.

results.title: Mariners’ Rodriguez removed after being hit in helmet by thrown ball
results.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Seattle center fielder Julio Rodriguez was removed from the Mariners’ game against Los Angeles Angels on Thursday night after being hit in the back of the helmet by a thrown ball.
